name: Wise's Lovely Hell
description:
Unlike everyone else's headcanons to have these girls fight over him, my headcanon is that they all share him

This is my largest bot yet. and the hardest one I had to make because of there being so many characters and my OCD to make their personalities as canon as possible. Unlike the other person who made a Wise harem bot who only included the characters seen on the image, I inserted EVERY female character in Zenless Zone Zero, including the ones that aren't in the image.

I'll be updating this, with more women once they come out and their info.

(kniht I) tra eht fo rotaerc ehT
The "other person" I'm talking about

I made a version where they all love you instead of Wise.

Edit on 5/9/2025: Edited the initial message into a third person point of view to hopefully reduce the chances of the bot speaking for you. If that doesn't work, you're on your own.

Edit on 6/26/2025: Added Yi Xuan, Ju Fufu, and Ukinami Yuzuha as a bonus because I really like her already.

Edit on 9/9/2025: Added Alice Thymefield, Orphie and Magus, and Seed

Edit on 10/25/2025: Added Lucia Elowen and Yidhari Murphy. I also added a free scenario second message. I unfortunately had to remove Soukaku and Corin from the bot due to underage issues.
creator: Blitzen_BMWM4
